hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *jarvis/missions/* ]]; then ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && mypy "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -20; fi

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *CLAUDE.md|*AGENTS.md) PY="/c/Program Files/Python311/python.exe"; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY="$(command -v python3 2>/dev/null || command -v python 2>/dev/null)"; [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/scripts/ci/sync_agents_md.py" --quiet ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */docs/*|docs/*) PY="/c/Program Files/Python311/python.exe"; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY="$(command -v python3 2>/dev/null || command -v python 2>/dev/null)"; [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/scripts/ci/docs_privacy_scan.py" "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ;; esac
